zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Hasilden於1500年出生在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德時，她的父親Frances Hasilden26歲，母親Elizabeth Calthorpe28歲。她於1516年1月與Robert Peyton在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1581年3月18日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frances Hasilden于1500年出生在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德时，她的父亲Frances Hasilden26岁，母亲Elizabeth Calthorpe28岁。她于1516年1月与Robert Peyton在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1581年3月18日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hasilden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hazeltine
meanings: English: habitational name chiefly from Hesleden in Halton Gill (Yorkshire), though Monk Hesleden (Durham), Haselden (Sussex), Haslingden (Lancashire), and Hazledon Farm (Wiltshire) are alternative possibilities. The Sussex placename derives from Old English hæsel ‘hazel’ + denn ‘pasture’, while the Lancashire placename derives from Old English hæslen ‘growing with hazels’ + denu ‘valley’. The other placenames derive from Old English hæsel + denu. There has been some confusion with Hazelton .

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Hasilden was born in 1500, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, her father, Frances Hasilden, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Calthorpe, was 28. She married Robert Peyton in January 1516, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 March 1581, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Hasilden est née en 1500, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Frances Hasilden, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Calthorpe, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Peyton en janvier 1516, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mars 1581, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frances Hasilden 1500 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Frances Hasilden 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Calthorpe 28. Sie hat im Januar 1516 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Peyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. März 1581 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Hasilden è nata il nel 1500 nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Frances Hasilden, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Calthorpe, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Robert Peyton nel gennaio 1516, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1581, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Hasildenが1500年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで生まれた時，父Frances Hasildenは26歳，母Elizabeth Calthorpeは28歳であった。1516年1月にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジでRobert Peytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1581年3月18日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Hasilden(이)가 1500년 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Frances Hasilden(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Calthorpe(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1516년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Robert Peyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1581년 3월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Hasilden nasceu em 1500, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Frances Hasilden, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Calthorpe, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Peyton em janeiro de 1516, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de março de 1581, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Hasilden родилась в 1500 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Frances Hasilden было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Calthorpe, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Peyton январь 1516 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 марта 1581 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frances Hasilden nació en 1500, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Frances Hasilden, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Calthorpe, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Robert Peyton en enero de 1516, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1581, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
